title: Klaun Macbeth
full_description: A non-verbal physical fusion of Western and Eastern influences retelling Shakespeare's Macbeth through clown and traditional Okinawan dance. Director and performer Makoto Inoue embodies Macbeth and every other character while Ryukyu dancer Riko Sugama plays Lady Macbeth — all against a backdrop of red ribbons that become doorways, passageways and traps. Over a thousand sound effects and no words spoken.
ai_summary: Japanese performer Makoto Inoue plays every role in Macbeth — through clown, mime and Okinawan dance — alongside a Ryukyu dancer in this non-verbal, 50-minute physical retelling. Red ribbons transform the stage from bedchamber to battlefield to murder scene.
